title: Fluency & Mastery
shortSummary: The final stretch — maintaining and deepening your Spanish to near-native level. Strategies for lifelong learning, accent refinement, thinking in Spanish, and integrating the language into every part of your life.
whyItMatters: Fluency is not a destination — it is a practice. This module covers the strategies and mindset shifts needed to maintain your Spanish at a high level, continue improving, and make the language a permanent part of your identity.
coreConcepts: Thinking in Spanish — not translating from English
Advanced listening: podcasts, films, music, radio
Writing at an advanced level: essays, articles, creative writing
Teaching others as a learning strategy
